name: Tuna Treat
directions: Fry onions and celery in margarine for 5 mins or until soft and golden.
Stir in cornflour and curry powder and cook over medium heat for 1-2 mins stirring constantly.
Meanwhile cook pasta shapes.
Add chicken stock to cornflour/curry mix and bring to the boil stirring.
Stir in tuna and season to taste with salt and pepper.
Add cooked pasta into individual bowls and serve the tuna over the top. At this stage you may like to try a little freshly squeezed lemon juice over the top.

similar.name: Pineapple Curry With Prawns and Mussels

name: Creamy Curried Veggies
directions: In a large saucepan, sauté the onions, garlic and carrots in oil on a medium-high heat until the onions become translucent.
Add the rest of the vegetables, curry, cumin, turmeric and cayenne, stirring often so they do not stick to the pan, cooking for 2-4 minutes. Add the milk, cover and reduce the heat to a medium low.

Simmer for 10-20 minutes, stirring occasionally until the potatoes can be easily pierce with a fork. Stir in the Braggs and cook uncovered on medium-high heat, stirring constantly until the liquid has thickened.
Variations:.
For some added colour add:.
1 Cup peas when you add the Braggs.
For some added nutrition add:.
2 Tbsp Nutritional Yeast as a garnish or in the last minute of cooking.
Delicious on its own or served over your favorite grains and legumes such as:.
Lentils, Rice, Quinoa, etc.

similar.name: Pineapple Curry With Prawns and Mussels

name: Curried Stuffed Fish
directions: Pre-heat oven to 325 degrees F.
Scale, clean and clean fish thoroughly.
Mix salt and pepper and rub all over inside the body cavity of the fish.
Mix together the next 8 ingredients and fill the body cavity of the fish with the stuffing-like mixture.
Secure the opening of the body cavity closed with toothpicks or skewers.
Make a 3 inch long and 1/4 inch deep slash slash across the top of the fish, so it doesn't crack.
Brush the oil over the fish, just enough to lightly coat it.  You can use a different kind of oil, if you prefer.
Lightly grease a rectangular baking dish, and lay the fish inside the pan.
Cook in pre-heated oven for about 50 minutes.
Test the fish with a fork: if it is flaky, then it's done, if not, then cook longer, watching carefully.

similar.name: Pineapple Curry With Prawns and Mussels

name: Anne's Curried Halibut
directions: Wash and pat dry fish.
Cut into serving size portions.
Salt and Pepper fish.
Butter baking dish.
Add onions.
Lay fish on top of onions.
Combine rest of ingredients except green onions in a bowl.
Pour mixture over fish.
Bake 350 for 30 minutes.
Sprinkle green onion over fish.
Serve with rice.

similar.name: Pineapple Curry With Prawns and Mussels

name: Pineapple Curry With Prawns and Mussels
directions: Bring half the coconut milk to the boil and heat, stirring, until it separates.
Add curry paste and cook until fragrant.
Add fish sauce and sugar and continue to cook for a few moments.
Stir in the rest of the coconut milk and bring back to the boil.
Add the prawns and mussels, with the pineapple and lime.
Reheat until boiling then simmer for 3-5 minutes, until prawns are cooked and mussels are opened.
Serve immediately, garnished with coriander and chopped chillies.

name: Buss up Shut (Paratha Roti)
directions: Sift and mix the flour, baking powder and salt. Add enough of water.
Knead to a soft dough and form four loyas or balls and leave to "rest" for about 15 - 30 minutes.
Roll out the dough after "resting".
Spread butter or ghee and sprinkle with flour.
Make a cut from the center out to the edge and roll making a cone.
Press the peak and flatten the center of the cone. Leave to "rest" about 15 - 30minutes.
Afterward, roll out on a floured board.
Using the flat side of a cup or other utensil, dip into butter or ghee and coat an already hot tawah.
Place the dough onto the tawah.
Spread the ghee or butter on one side using the flat edge of the cup, then turn over onto the other side to cook.
Spread butter or ghee on the other side the same way.
When cooked on both sides use a dabla to break up the roti to give the ripped up, flaky appearance.
You can alternatively, wrap the roti in a clean cloth and beat with your hands or bailna.
The finished buss up shut ready to be served.
